stemHtml: You depart from London Heathrow Airport. Shortly after departure in the climb-out, you realise, that you have to return to Heathrow but you have to dump fuel and advise ATC. Which of the following instructions may you expect from ATC?

options.a: Proceed to English Channel to make a right racetrack pattern, climb 5 000 ft and start dumping there.
options.b: Proceed to English Channel to make a right racetrack pattern, climb 6 000 ft and start dumping there.
options.c: Climb straight ahead until 4 000 ft and start dumping upon reaching.
options.d: Climb straight ahead an start dumping immediately.
